project_type: Flutter cross-platform SSH/SFTP client with local AI assistant
build_system: Flutter (flutter pub get, flutter build). No Flutter SDK available in sandbox.
test_framework: flutter_test with FlutterSecureStorage.setMockInitialValues({}) for mocking secure storage. Tests in flat test/ directory.
verification_instructions: Since Flutter/Dart is not available in the sandbox, use Dart static analysis patterns (check imports, syntax correctness via grep). Validate code follows existing patterns found in vault_access_log.dart and chat_history_storage.dart.
setup_instructions: flutter pub get (not available in sandbox)
environment_constraints: No Flutter SDK or Dart SDK available. No network for package installs (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY). Use AST-level validation: ensure files have correct imports, follow project conventions, and are syntactically valid Dart.
contribution_requirements: From AGENTS.md: Safety before execution - never blindly execute AI commands. Always show what will run, why, confirmation before execution. Every execution is logged per ROADMAP.md Phase 3 design principles.
key_patterns: 1. Storage uses FlutterSecureStorage with JSON serialization (see chat_history_storage.dart, vault_access_log.dart). 2. Models are immutable with toJson/fromJson factories. 3. Features live in lib/features/{name}/ with widgets/ subdirectory. 4. Core services in lib/core/{domain}/. 5. Theme: Geometric Brutalism with AppColors (black/white/red, zero-radius). 6. Tests use FlutterSecureStorage.setMockInitialValues({}) in setUp. 7. VaultAccessLog pattern: stores events in secure storage with max cap, JSON serialization, insert-at-front ordering.
directory_structure: lib/core/ (services, models, vault, ai, storage, theme), lib/features/ (ai_assistant, terminal, servers, sftp, etc.), test/ (flat test files with _test.dart suffix)
